spell.name: Vindicator's Judgement
spell.text: You pronounce a terrible judgment upon your quarry that causes all of your attacks and divine spells to strike with deadly efficacy. The target takes extra damage from your attacks, depending on the result of its Fortitude save. The spell ends immediately if the target is no longer your hunted prey.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

defense.success: The target has weakness 5 to the next Strike you make against it or damaging divine spell you cast that includes it as a target before the end of your next turn.
defense.failure: The target has weakness 5 to all Strikes you make against it or damaging divine spells you cast that includes it as a target for the duration of the spell.
defense.critical_failure: As failure, but the target is off-guard against the first Strike or divine spell attack you make against it each round for the duration of the spell.
